prompt: Aesthetic close-up food photography of a crispy Korean-style corn dog on a wooden stick, heavily drizzled with creamy white and yellow sauces, sprinkled with spicy red masala seasoning, served on a biodegradable tray over a dark wooden table. Warm cozy cafe lighting, shallow depth of field, soft shadows, golden-brown crunchy texture, comfort food vibe. Cute handwritten doodles and pastel annotations around the food saying phrases like “good morning,” “comfort food,” “masala magic,” and “little bites, big happiness,” with hearts, arrows, stars, and dashed lines. Instagram story style, cozy warm tones, cinematic foodie aesthetic, highly detailed, realistic food texture, trendy social media layout.
